peakaContainerRegistryAccessSecret.description: Credentials used to pull the Peaka container images from the GCP Artifact Registry.

password.description: Full JSON of a GCP service-account key with Artifact Registry Reader on the Peaka image repository.

tls.description: TLS for the Peaka access domain. Either reference an existing secret (secretName) or provide cert + key.

enabled.description: Enable in-chart TLS termination (Traefik serves the certificate on its websecure entrypoint). Leave false when TLS is terminated upstream by an OpenShift Route / edge.

secretName.description: Name of an existing kubernetes.io/tls secret to use instead of cert/key. Recommended on OpenShift: pre-create it with `oc create secret tls <name> --cert=fullchain.pem --key=key.pem` and set this. The catalog install form is single-line and strips PEM newlines when pasted, so referencing a pre-created secret is the reliable path.

cert.description: PEM-encoded TLS certificate, full chain (leaf + intermediates). Used only when secretName is not set; prefer secretName on OpenShift.

key.description: PEM-encoded TLS private key matching the certificate. Used only when secretName is not set.

accessUrl.description: Public URL the Peaka application is reached at (used for CORS, redirects and generated links).

dbcDomain.description: Domain for the JDBC/DBC endpoint, e.g. onpremise-dbc.peaka.dev

redhatRegistryAccessSecret.description: Optional. registry.redhat.io credentials for the Red Hat redis image. Not needed on OpenShift — the cluster's global pull secret already covers registry.redhat.io. Provide only on clusters without it.

predefinedUsers.description: Optional list of users seeded at install time.

openAIApiKey.description: Optional OpenAI API key to enable AI-assisted features.

sampleDataAppId.description: Optional sample-data application id to seed demo data.

ingress.description: Optional Kubernetes Ingress for the web UI (alternative to an OpenShift Route).

dbcIngress.description: Optional Kubernetes Ingress for the JDBC/DBC endpoint.
